description: Builds a site-specific ventilation plan, strata- (ground-) control plan, or blasting plan for a mine — hazard-ranked on the org risk matrix, with critical controls hierarchy-ranked, grounded in the Mines Act / DGMS plan duties and the ICMM principal-hazard framing. Use it to draft a mine ventilation plan, a strata/ground-control plan, or a blasting/shotfiring plan for a specific opencast or underground mine. Decision-support that drafts a reviewable plan; a competent person owns the engineering judgement and signs off.
name: mine-ventilation-strata-blasting-plan
notes: Markdown-report degradation; run the intake conversationally.
